title: Swami Atmanand Schools Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 23 Teacher, Assistant Teacher and More Posts
organization: Swami Atmanand Utkrisht (English Medium) School Management Committee, Balrampur-Ramanujganj, Chhattisgarh
post_name: Lecturer (Vyakhayata), Teacher (Shikshak), Physical Education Teacher, Assistant Teacher & Lab Assistant Teacher
short_info: District Education Office, Balrampur-Ramanujganj is recruiting 23 teaching posts on contract basis with Graduation/Post Graduation + B.Ed qualification. Last date to apply is 09 June 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notification. Candidates need to send application through Registered Post only.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be between 21 to 35 years as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation applicable as per Chhattisgarh Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-wise as mentioned in vacancy table (Graduation/Post Graduation with B.Ed compulsory for most posts). Entire education must be in English Medium (except Hindi & Sanskrit posts).
qualification.domicile: Must be a native of Chhattisgarh (Domicile Certificate mandatory).
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01-01-2026. Only Chhattisgarh domicile candidates are eligible.

selection_process: Post Name 10th 12th Graduation Post Graduation Total
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit applications only through Registered Post / Speed Post . Applications should reach the office on or before 09-06-2026 (5:30 PM).

Address: District Education Officer cum Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht English Medium School Management Committee, Joint District Office, Collectorate Premises, Balrampur, District Balrampur-Ramanujganj (C.G.) - 497119
important_instructions: This is a purely contractual appointment for 1 year. No claim for regular absorption. Only Chhattisgarh domicile candidates can apply. Entire education must be in English Medium (except specific posts). Applications received after the last date or by ordinary post will not be accepted. Incomplete or incorrect applications will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the Selection Committee will be final.
